title: Copper and Iron Swap
description: This is a resource pack that changes the textures of most if not all instances of iron into copper and vise versa.
body:
This resource pack aims to have all instances of Iron turned into Copper and vise versa. Almost any instance of either has been swapped for the other, though I am merely just a little guy so please let me know if there's one I missed.

Made for Minecraft Java 1.20 but should work fine for other versions, will update if applicable.
